questions.question: Describe the general structure of a Unix command, including the options and arguments. What is the difference between options and arguments?
questions.hint: Explain the syntax and usage of options and arguments in Unix commands

questions.question: What is the purpose of the pipe (|) symbol in Unix commands? Provide an example of its usage.
questions.hint: Explain the role of pipes in Unix command chaining and provide an example

questions.question: Compare and contrast the uses of redirection operators (> and <) in Unix commands. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Explain the syntax and usage of redirection operators in Unix commands and provide examples
